steps.title: Use Text 1's skepticism
steps.content: Text 2 claims Ribeiro's method could improve genre classification and benefit users. Text 1 is skeptical of genre classification itself, saying genres are ambiguous, subjective, simplistic, and may not be the best way to understand musical relationships.

steps.title: Reject views Text 1 lacks
steps.content: Choice A agrees with the potential benefits instead of challenging the premise. Choice C discusses which genres systems recognize, not whether genre is useful. Choice D brings in listener enjoyment, which Text 1 does not discuss. The answer is B.
